---
applyTo: 'data/**/*.md,data/**/*.mdx,data/**/*.ts,data/**/*.js'
---

- Traditional Chinese content should use `zh-TW`, natural technical wording, and avoid HR-style exaggeration.
- English content should match the Chinese source in claims, dates, project scope, and measurable outcomes.
- Published personal pages and blog posts should exist in both languages.
- Keep the same blog slug across locale variants.
- Follow `docs/ai/blog-publishing-policy.md` for AI disclosure and human review rules.
